Dakar Oceanic Information

Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Dakar Oceanic G - GND - FL145 -
Dakar Oceanic G - FL145 - FL195 With the exception of ATS Routes
Dakar Oceanic A - FL195 - FL245 -
Dakar Oceanic UIR A - FL245 - UNLTD -
GOOO

SLOP

  • The use of SLOP in Dakar Oceanic is in compliance with provisions in ICAO Doc. 4444, between flight level FL280 and UNLTD.
